# Delegation Profile
# AUTO-GENERATED by render-profile.sh from ~/.config/frugal/profile.json
# Do not edit directly. Re-run `frugal config` to change it.

Subscribed worker agents: Antigravity, Codex.

Routing: complexity-auto. Apply the shared Model Auto-Routing Criteria in harness-core.md:
- Standard tasks: plan on Sonnet; Codex effort `medium`; Antigravity model `Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Thinking)`.
- Complex tasks: plan on Opus (after user approval); Codex effort `xhigh`; Antigravity model `Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking)`.

Per-role delegation priority (try the first agent; fall back down the list if it is unavailable or out of quota):
- Plan: Claude
- Implementation (exec): Antigravity -> Codex
- Review: Antigravity -> Codex
- Docs: Antigravity -> Codex
- Ship (commit/push): Codex -> Antigravity

Antigravity model fallback chain (use in order; switch when the current model is out of quota or unavailable):
  1. `Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Thinking)` — default for standard tasks
  2. `Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking)` — default for complex tasks
  3. `Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)` — fallback when Claude quota exhausted
  4. `Gemini 3.5 Flash (Medium)` — last resort

Invocation forms:
- Antigravity standard: `agy --model "Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Thinking)" -p "<task>"`
- Antigravity complex:  `agy --model "Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking)" -p "<task>"`
- Antigravity (add `--dangerously-skip-permissions` when the task requires autonomous file edits).
- Codex standard: `codex exec "<task>" < /dev/null`.
- Codex complex:  `codex -c plan_mode_reasoning_effort=xhigh exec "<task>" < /dev/null`.
